gaap_vs_fair_value.land_policy: Land and development property carried at cost; 270k acres not marked to fair value each quarter
gaap_vs_fair_value.source: 10-K FY2025 Item 1; SEC company facts CY2025

inputs.fcf_source: 3-year average cash from operations ($11.4M) minus maintenance capital spending ($6.0M), divided by 26.916M shares; excludes $46.6M land-bank purchases per 10-K FY2025 investing cash flows
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: GAAP stockholders equity $475.2M / shares; land at historical cost — not a fair-value dhando floor for 270k acres
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 cash from operations fell to $6.1M (water timing, development spend); Lawrence base uses 2023–2025 average owner cash, not land-acquisition investing outflows.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: Illustrative $8,000/acre on 25% of 270k developable acres [Assumption]; Tejon Conservancy and entitlement risk cap upside
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: Illustrative $12,000/acre on 30% of acreage + book-adjacent operating value [Assumption]
optionality_gate.notes: Price ~$18.84 near GAAP book; Lawrence cash IRR weak; optionality gate uses conservative acre NAV not book.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025: approximately 270,000 acres contiguous; land carried at cost

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Centennial / Grapevine master-planned community timing and homebuilder economics
Per-acre marks on FY2025 $46.6M real-estate acquisitions
Water-bank contract monetization beyond run-rate farming/mineral cash

segments_or_options.label: Centennial & Grapevine entitled residential (pre-revenue)
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 resort/residential segment; long-term entitlements; no segment revenue in period

segments_or_options.label: TRCC commercial/industrial build-out
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025: Commercial/Industrial segment $15.4M operating income incl. JV equity earnings

segments_or_options.label: Long-term water assets & banking
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 water asset volumes; tangible water assets $44.9M on balance sheet (XBRL)

segments.label: Commercial / industrial real estate & JVs
segments.revenue_source: 10-K FY2025 segment revenue (Commercial/Industrial member, XBRL partial)

options.label: Resort / residential entitlements (Centennial, Grapevine)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Pre-revenue entitled land; P=15% x illustrative $400M community NAV / shares
options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 Item 1; resort/residential segment no revenue in period

segment_build.slack_notes: Segment revenues sum below consolidated $49.6M (intersegment eliminations); Lawrence consolidated uses normalized $0.20/sh owner cash.

bear.notes: Entitlement delays; OCF stays at FY2025 trough

base.notes: Normalized run-rate farming/mineral/industrial cash; no residential lift

bull.notes: TRCC lease-up + water sales; still excludes full Centennial NAV in Lawrence path

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (7yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
